data.heading: About me
data.name: Tibor Buček
data.body:
My entire life story, which I spent almost entirely in international trade, is schematically expressed in my resume, which I send upon request after clicking the "View my CV". Most of my time was spent in the corporate industry.

Concrete experiences during my stay in the USA, in Russia, in China and in a German engineering company, where I was also a co-owner, gave me a picture of the different business approaches between the West and the East.

When I was approached by the Ministry of Economy 15 years ago to improve the management of foreign trade in the state administration, I gladly accepted this challenge. This is how I moved from the corporate industry to the state administration in the field of foreign trade management.
data.title: Diplomacy & Innovation
